zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Christopher Burgoyne於1474年出生在英國坎布利其爾朗 斯坦頓時，他的父親Thomas Burgoyne II32歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Staverton27歲。他於1495年與Thomasine Freville在英國坎布利其爾朗 斯坦頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1540年在英國坎布利其爾坎布利其享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Christopher Burgoyne于1474年出生在英国坎布利其爾朗 斯坦頓时，他的父亲Thomas Burgoyne II32岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Staverton27岁。他于1495年与Thomasine Freville在英国坎布利其爾朗 斯坦頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1540年在英国坎布利其爾坎布利其享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Burgoyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Middle English Burgoin, Old French Bourgogne, Latin Burgundia), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the West Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404, duke from 1363).

variants.name: Burgin
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from Burgundy, Old French Bourgogne, Bourgoin ‘the Burgundian’. Alternatively, from the synonymous name Burgoyne .
Swiss German (Bürgin): from a pet form of the personal name Burkhard (see Burkhart ).

variants.name: Burgamy
meanings: English (Norfolk): variant of Burgany, itself a variant of Burgoyne (Middle English Bourgoine, Burgonye ‘Burgundy’). This form of the name is now rare or absent in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Christopher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Christopher Burgoyne was born in 1474, in Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, Thomas Burgoyne II, was 32 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Staverton, was 27. He married Thomasine Freville in 1495, in Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1540, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Christopher Burgoyne est né en 1474, à Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Burgoyne II, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Staverton, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Thomasine Freville en 1495, à Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1540, à Canteburge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Christopher Burgoyneが1474年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアロング スタントンで生まれた時，父Thomas Burgoyne IIは32歳，母Lady Elizabeth Stavertonは27歳であった。1495年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアロング スタントンでThomasine Frevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1540年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Christopher Burgoyne(이)가 1474년 영국 캄브리지실르 론그 스탠턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Burgoyne II(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Staverton(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1495년 영국 캄브리지실르 론그 스탠턴에서 Thomasine Freville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1540년 영국 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Christopher Burgoyne родился в 1474 г. в местности лонг стантон, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Burgoyne II было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Staverton, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Thomasine Freville в 1495 г. в местности лонг стантон, камбриджешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1540 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.

Se casó con Thomasine Freville en 1495, en Long Stanton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1540, en Cantebriche, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años.
